plans.title: Art direction
plans.description:
Decide what kind of style for the aesthetic. 

Should I go for the pixel art aesthetic?
pro: known technique
cons: I dont have the skills

Should I integrate real-life photo for the environment and asset?
Pro: should be easier
Cons: how? and what kind of looks will it be?

plans.title: Game play mechanics
plans.description:
Finalise the main mechanic and its deriavative.

Result: continue with the jumping game mechanic. But will revise as development goes further and whatever feels fun will be tested

logEntries.content: Came to a decision for the game - continue on iterating the jumping game, iterating the fun as I go

create the website for game development journal.
